table.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top;

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: The logical name of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Information about the use of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Minimum and Maximum # of times the element can appear in the instance

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px; width: 100px

a.title: Reference to the type of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck1.png)

a.title: Individual Healthcare Identifier (IHI) assigned under the HI Service to a patient.

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

a.style: padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; border: 1px maroon solid; font-weight: bold; color: #301212; background-color: #fdf4f4;; padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; border: 1px maroon solid; font-weight: bold; color: #301212; background-color: #fdf4f4;
a.title: This element has or is affected by constraints ( inv-ihi-value-0, inv-ihi-value-1, inv-ihi-value-2 )

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Individual Healthcare Identifier (IHI)
Constraints: inv-ihi-value-0, inv-ihi-value-1, inv-ihi-value-2

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck13.png)
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Extension
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck134.png)

tr.td:
Code defined by a terminology system
Fixed Value: (Complex)

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck1010.png)

tr.td:
Identity of the terminology system
Fixed Value: http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v2-0203

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck1000.png)

tr.td:
Symbol in syntax defined by the system
Fixed Value: NI

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
td.span: The namespace for the identifier value

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck00.png)
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

a.style: padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; border: 1px maroon solid; font-weight: bold; color: #301212; background-color: #fdf4f4;; padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; border: 1px maroon solid; font-weight: bold; color: #301212; background-color: #fdf4f4;
a.title: This element has or is affected by constraints ( inv-ihi-0, inv-ihi-1, inv-ihi-2 )

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

description.value: This identifier profile defines an Individual Healthcare Identifier in an Australian context (see [Australian Digital Health Agency](https://developer.digitalhealth.gov.au/specifications/national-infrastructure/ep-1826-2014/nehta-1163-2010) for further information). An IHI is assigned under the Healthcare Identifiers (HI) Service to a patient.

copyright.value: HL7 Australia© 2018+; Licensed Under Creative Commons No Rights Reserved.

definition.value: Individual Healthcare Identifier (IHI) assigned under the HI Service to a patient.

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children
IHI shall be an exactly 16 digit number
IHI prefix is 800360
IHI shall pass the Luhn algorithm check

map.value: CX / EI (occasionally, more often EI maps to a resource id or a URL)
II - The Identifier class is a little looser than the v3 type II because it allows URIs as well as registered OIDs or GUIDs. Also maps to Role[classCode=IDENT]

definition.value: Unique id for the element within a resource (for internal references). This may be any string value that does not contain spaces.

description.value: Extensions are always sliced by (at least) url

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children
Must have either extensions or value[x], not both

definition.value: IHI number status associated with an IHI identifier.

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children
Must have either extensions or value[x], not both

definition.value: Known IHI record status associated with an IHI identifier.

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children
Must have either extensions or value[x], not both

definition.value: The date, and optionally time, that the IHI was verified with HI Services.

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children
Must have either extensions or value[x], not both

short.value: usual | official | temp | secondary | old (If known)

comment.value: Applications can assume that an identifier is permanent unless it explicitly says that it is temporary.

requirements.value: Allows the appropriate identifier for a particular context of use to be selected from among a set of identifiers.

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

isModifierReason.value: This is labeled as "Is Modifier" because applications should not mistake a temporary id for a permanent one.

description.value: Identifies the purpose for this identifier, if known .

definition.value: A coded type for the identifier that can be used to determine which identifier to use for a specific purpose.

comment.value: This element deals only with general categories of identifiers. It SHOULD not be used for codes that correspond 1..1 with the Identifier.system. Some identifiers may fall into multiple categories due to common usage. Where the system is known, a type is unnecessary because the type is always part of the system definition. However systems often need to handle identifiers where the system is not known. There is not a 1:1 relationship between type and system, since many different systems have the same type.

requirements.value: Allows users to make use of identifiers when the identifier system is not known.

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

description.value: A coded type for an identifier that can be used to determine which identifier to use for a specific purpose.

short.value: The namespace for the identifier value

definition.value: Establishes the namespace for the value - that is, a URL that describes a set values that are unique.

requirements.value: There are many sets of identifiers. To perform matching of two identifiers, we need to know what set we're dealing with. The system identifies a particular set of unique identifiers.

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

definition.value: The portion of the identifier typically relevant to the user and which is unique within the context of the system.

comment.value: This concept is equivalent to Australian Institute of Health and Welfare data element 743458 [Person—Individual Healthcare Identifier, N(16)](https://meteor.aihw.gov.au/content/index.phtml/itemId/743458).

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

map.value: II.extension or II.root if system indicates OID or GUID (Or Role.id.extension or root)

short.value: Time period when id is/was valid for use

definition.value: Time period during which identifier is/was valid for use.

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

short.value: Organization that issued id (may be just text)

comment.value: The Identifier.assigner may omit the .reference element and only contain a .display element reflecting the name or other textual information about the assigning organization.

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

map.value: II.assigningAuthorityName but note that this is an improper use by the definition of the field. Also Role.scoper

definition.value: Individual Healthcare Identifier (IHI) assigned under the HI Service to a patient.

human.value: IHI shall be an exactly 16 digit number
IHI prefix is 800360
IHI shall pass the Luhn algorithm check

comment.value: This concept is equivalent to Australian Institute of Health and Welfare data element 743458 [Person—Individual Healthcare Identifier, N(16)](https://meteor.aihw.gov.au/content/index.phtml/itemId/743458).
